title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies!
